texto: A personality disorder is not the foreign presence of demonic possession or a cancerous cluster of cells spreading among the internal organs. It is a pattern of cognition and reaction that impares the capacity to be productive, happy and generally at ease. It is a fractured sense of self giving way to the weight of stressful interpersonal dynamics.
explicacao: Citação de Merri Lisa Johnson sobre temas ligados a felicidade. “A personality disorder is not the foreign presence of demonic possession or a cancerous cluster o…” articula felicidade, mental-health, mental-illness em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como mental-illness e personality-disorder.
